name: workflow-topology-field
title: Workflow Topology Field
description: An atmospheric SVG background that renders an application-defined workflow as a topology: nodes with lifecycle status, directed connections, an animated active path, quietly-settled completed paths, and failed nodes marked with a ring + glyph (never color alone). Density thins over a readable safe area. Deterministic (SSR-safe), light/dark, reduced-motion-static, forced-colors-safe, offscreen-paused. No canvas, no WebGL, no heavy deps.
